free_text: Measurement of the nitrogen total cross section from
0.5 eV to 50 MeV and analysis of the 433-keV resonance
Elastic scattering data.
ORELA.
Photoneutrons produced by 5 nsec wide, 150
MeV electrons.
DW + TK
BP: Updated references, authors,
digitized elastic scattering data: subentries 4-6
added.
OS. Units in sub.2 corrected
average of runs 11677 and 11678.
Nitrogen gas in stainless steel cylinders. 2 runs
with areal density of sample 0.2113 atoms/b in one
cylinder and 0.2092 atoms/b in the other.
6Li glass detector.
80.117-m flight path.
Corrected for dead time and background.
Absolute uncertainty.
Data produced from J. Harvey files by D.Wiarda.
OS. EN units changed from EV to KEV
Run id: 11718
Nitrogen gas in stainless steel cylinders. 5 runs
with pressures in cylinder of 480 to 490 psi. Average
areal density 0.37427 atoms/b.
NE110 scintillation detector coupled to photo-
multipliers.
201.568-m flight path.
Corrected for dead time and background.
Absolute uncertainty.
Data produced from J. Harvey files by D.Wiarda.
57.80 g of silicon nitride (Si3N4) powder contained
in a 8.4 g hollow graphite cylinder with a 0.05 cm
bottom (7.0 cm high, 3.81 cm outside diameter, and
3.70 cm inside diameter).
Six neutron detectors: 7.62-cm long and 4.32-
cm diameter cylinder of NE-110 scintillators.
200-m flight path.
Data were not corrected for multiple
scattering in the sample. This implies uncertainties
for relative differential cross sections of ~10%.
BP
